title: malus pumila var. joannis
intro: Malus pumila var. joannis, also known as the 'Joan's apple', is a specific variety of the common crabapple tree. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus pumila var. joannis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
